events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need decide compliance for ABS-to-PVC glued with wrong cement in residential plumbing rough-complete. Need apply IPC and manufacturer listings. ABS and PVC are different thermoplastics. Joining ABS to PVC requires proper transition fitting/adapter and proper cement per manufacturer. Using wrong cement (e.g., PVC cement on ABS or all-purpose not listed) violates IPC and manufacturer instructions. Non-compliant, installed-defective. Decision fail. Risk high? Leak/sewage backup potential, but at rough stage can be corrected. High maybe. Component conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete rough-complete maybe 60? Value 0. Confidence 0.95. Findings: transition joint made with cement not listed for ABS-to-PVC; no proper transition fitting. Actions: cut out joint, install approved transition fitting (e.g., ABS to PVC transition coupling with proper primer/cement per manufacturer and code), re-inspect. Rationale: IPC requires joints and connections to be made with materials and methods in accordance with manufacturer instructions and code; ABS and PVC require compatible listed solvent cement or mechanical transition; wrong cement creates unreliable joint. References: IPC maybe 605.16.2? Need exact anchors. IPC sections: IPC 605.16 Plastic pipe, joints and connections. IPC 605.16.2 ABS plastic. IPC 605.16.3 PVC plastic. Also IPC 303.1 Approved materials and listing. Manufacturer listings. Could reference IPC 605.16.1, 605.16.2, 605.16.3, IPC 303.1. Also UPC? But reference says IPC. We'll include IPC 605.16.2/605.16.3 and IPC 303.1. Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside.
